title: Zoom in - new text shows, old text disappears, X disappears
scenario: Zooming in on a big blue dot causes old text and X button to disappear while new description text appears
steps: Open the app and locate a big blue dot on the screen.
Tap or interact with the big blue dot to zoom in.
Observe the old text (headline, swipe) on the screen.
Observe the X button on the screen.
Observe the new text (description) appearing on the screen.
expected: When zooming in on a big blue dot, the old text (headline, swipe) disappears, the X button disappears, and new text (description) appears.
